recipe.title: Healthy one-cup pancakes
recipe.description: Give these super easy and convenient pancakes a go - this recipe is an incredible way to get loads of fruit and veg in for everyone!

ingredients.name: mug of semi-skimmed milk or your favourite unsweetened

steps.descr: Put all the ingredients into a large bowl with a small...
steps.instructions: Put all the ingredients into a large bowl with a small pinch of sea salt (for fatter, fluffier pancakes, use a heaped mug of flour) and whisk well, adding the extra sweet or savoury ingredient, if you wish.

on_enter.say: Put all the ingredients into a large bowl with a small pinch of sea salt (for fatter, fluffier pancakes, use a heaped mug of flour) and whisk well, adding the extra sweet or savoury ingredient, if you wish.

steps.descr: Put a large non-stick frying pan on a medium heat
steps.instructions: Put a large non-stick frying pan on a medium heat. Spritz with olive oil, then go in with a few separate tablespoons of batter. Add your chosen fruit or veg to each, then, once golden on the base, gently flip over, until lightly golden on the fruit or veg side, too. Serve, and repeat!

on_enter.say: Put a large non-stick frying pan on a medium heat. Spritz with olive oil, then go in with a few separate tablespoons of batter. Add your chosen fruit or veg to each, then, once golden on the base, gently flip over, until lightly golden on the fruit or veg side, too. Serve, and repeat!
